## Summary

Describe the user or developer impact and the reason for the change.

## Security Impact

Explain any effect on compilation, audit validity, build fingerprints,
permissions, secrets, signing, or deployment-gate enforcement. Write `None`
when the change does not affect those surfaces.

## Verification

List the exact commands and manual checks used to validate the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is narrowly scoped and preserves upstream compatibility.
- [ ] Tests cover security-critical or user-facing behavior.
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, wallet material, or credentials are included.
- [ ] Documentation and screenshots are updated when behavior or UI changed.
- [ ] Required OpenCode and third-party attribution remains intact.
